blockers.description: App crashes on real Switch hardware (fw 21.1.0 / Atmosphere 1.10.1) — deko3D init crash. Second wave of SD card debug logging added to main.cpp and file_browser.cpp constructor to narrow crash step further.
blockers.workaround: Deploy latest dist/SwitchPalace.nro, launch on hardware, retrieve sdmc:/switchpalace_debug.log — last line shows exact crash step

human_actions_pending.action: Copy dist/SwitchPalace.nro to sd:/switch/SwitchPalace/SwitchPalace.nro and launch it, then retrieve sdmc:/switchpalace_debug.log and paste it
human_actions_pending.context: Second round of debug logging added — logs now cover: main entered, applet mode, borealis init call, Application::init OK, createWindow OK, ContentManager cleanup, FileBrowserView ctor start, base layout set, titleBar added. Last line = crash step.

decisions.rationale: borealis SwitchPlatform calls nifm status functions every frame for status bar; uninitialized handle = IPC crash = 2168-0001

decisions.decision: Switched video backend from GLFW+EGL to deko3D (-DUSE_DEKO3D=ON)
decisions.rationale: GLFW glfwInit() fails in applet mode on fw 21.1.0 — EGL/drm_nouveau applet-mode incompatibility; borealis fatal() throws uncaught std::logic_error -> abort. deko3D is the standard Switch GPU API used by all working borealis homebrew
128MB is the hbloader ceiling in applet mode with no headroom
borealis fatal() throws std::logic_error; uncaught = std::terminate -> abort -> 2168-0001

decisions.decision: Second round of SD card debug logging added to file_browser.cpp constructor
decisions.rationale: First round showed crash is after borealis init — now logging FileBrowserView construction steps to see if crash is in UI layout code vs borealis render thread startup

next_action: User deploys dist/SwitchPalace.nro to Switch and reports back what the last line of sdmc:/switchpalace_debug.log is. Then diagnose and fix based on that. Remove all debug logging before final hw-verify.
context_notes: Three successive crashes fixed: (1) nifm uninitialized -> IPC abort (2168-0001), (2) GLFW glfwInit fail in applet mode -> uncaught exception abort, (3) current: deko3D/borealis init still crashing but we do not yet know which sub-step. Second debug round now logs into FileBrowserView ctor. Debug log covers: 'main: entered', 'mode: APPLET/APPLICATION', 'borealis: calling Application::init', 'borealis: Application::init OK, calling createWindow', 'borealis: createWindow OK', 'cleanup: entering ContentManager cleanup', 'cleanup: ContentManager cleanup done', 'ui: constructing FileBrowserView', 'FileBrowserView: ctor start', 'FileBrowserView: base layout set', 'FileBrowserView: titleBar added'. Build is via Docker only.
